name: strava-custom-coach
description: Track and analyze cycling performance from Strava. Includes automated ride analysis, fitness trend monitoring, and personalized training plan generation with goal-based periodization.
author: openclaw

scripts.training_plan.py: Generate and manage personalized training plans
scripts.analyze_rides.py: Analyze recent rides with power/HR metrics
scripts.get_latest_ride.py: Fetch and summarize the most recent ride
scripts.analyze_ride.py: Deep-analyze a specific ride by activity ID
scripts.monitor_rides.sh: Background monitor for new ride detection

references.training-zones.md: Power/HR zone definitions and TSS reference
references.plan-templates.md: Pre-built plan template structures by goal
